    "Conveyor belt mistracking caused by off-center loading and idler skew",
    "Potential for belt damage, material spillage, and friction-induced fire hazard",
    "Risk of worker entanglement or crushing due to belt running off its tracked path while in operation"

    "Lockout/Tagout (LOTO) the conveyor system immediately to halt operation",
    "Re-align and adjust the skewed idlers to correct the tracking path",
    "Adjust the chute or loading mechanism to ensure material is loaded centrally on the belt",
    "Inspect the belt edges and structure for damage before restarting"
  ],
  "rationale": "The conveyor belt is actively mistracking due to off-center loading and skewed idlers while the system is in-progress. This creates immediate mechanical hazards, potential for catastrophic belt failure, and severe safety risks to nearby personnel, violating basic machine guarding and operational safety standards.",

    "CEMA (Conveyor Equipment Manufacturers Association) Belt Conveyors for Bulk Materials"
